raw.message: One punch to become a boxing legend!💪

hook.summary: A boxer recovers from a knockdown to deliver a winning knockout punch.
hook.visual_action: A boxer in red is knocked down, then the camera rotates as he rises and punches his opponent.

scene_flow: Boxer is knocked down to the canvas in a dramatic slow-motion shot.
Camera rotates around the fallen boxer as he regains his footing.
The boxer delivers a powerful counter-punch to the opponent's face.
Final splash screen with game logo and app store download buttons.
audience_proxy: Young males who enjoy competitive sports games and stylized action combat.
